name: hourly-session-summary
description: Generate hourly token usage and cost summary
task:
Generate an hourly session summary report with:
1. Token usage by model (input/output)
2. Cost breakdown by model
3. Cache efficiency stats
4. Brief work summary
5. Send to Telegram

Use the format from openrouter-optimization/cron/summary-template.md
Only generate if activity detected in last hour (skip if idle).
